seoTitle: Dulwich Hill vs Dum Dum — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dulwich Hill and Dum Dum. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Dulwich Hill vs Dum Dum: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dulwich Hill and Dum Dum.
heading: Dulwich Hill vs Dum Dum — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dulwich Hill, New South Wales and Dum Dum, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dulwich Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Dum Dum (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dulwich Hill or Dum Dum safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dulwich Hill has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Dum Dum scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dulwich Hill scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Dum Dum scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dulwich Hill or Dum Dum?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dulwich Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
